findings.title: Ticket Prep V2 command missing: tickets lint
findings.description: Fresh-project verification failed at `swarm tickets lint --strict` with `unknown command "tickets" for "swarm"` (exit 1).
findings.suggested_fix: Implement/restore the `tickets` command group with `lint` subcommand per Ticket Prep V2 contract.

findings.title: Ticket Prep V2 command missing: prompts build/validate
findings.description: `swarm prompts build --all --strict` failed with `unknown flag: --all` and `swarm prompts validate --strict` failed with `unknown flag: --strict` (both exit 1), indicating only `prompts check` is exposed.
findings.suggested_fix: Implement/restore `swarm prompts build` and `swarm prompts validate` with strict-mode flags and expected arguments.

findings.title: Fresh-path prep/watch flow is blocked
findings.description: In the fresh scaffold, `swarm prep --json` failed with `missing prompt file` for added ticket and `swarm watch --once --dry-run` then failed with `prep gate failed` (both exit 1), preventing the required lint->build->validate->prep->watch flow.
findings.suggested_fix: After adding lint/build/validate commands, ensure the documented fresh-path sequence can generate/validate prompts and pass prep before watch.

summary: Quality gates: `go test ./... -count=1`, `go build ./...`, and `go vet ./...` all passed. Ticket Prep V2 E2E flow failed in a fresh project because `tickets lint`, `prompts build`, and `prompts validate` are not currently available/supported, and prep/watch remained blocked.
